article.title: Everyday phone call phrases
article.description: Answering: 'Hello, this is [name] speaking.' Asking to hold: 'Could you hold on a second?' Ending: 'Thanks for calling, talk soon!' Common mistake: 'I am [name]' on the phone sounds unnatural in English — 'This is [name]' is the standard phone convention.
article.content: Answering: 'Hello, this is [name] speaking.' Asking to hold: 'Could you hold on a second?' Ending: 'Thanks for calling, talk soon!' Common mistake: 'I am [name]' on the phone sounds unnatural in English — 'This is [name]' is the standard phone convention.

generated.caption:
Ever said "I am John" on the phone and felt it sounded a bit off? 🤔

The standard way to answer is "Hello, this is John speaking." Need to pause the call? Just say "Could you hold on a second?" And to end politely, try "Thanks for calling, talk soon!"

Master your phone calls! Save this post and follow @EnglishVault for daily lessons!
generated.script:
Aap bhi phone pe 'I am [name]' bolte ho? Ye common mistake hai!

So, phone pe jab koi poochta hai 'Who is this?', 'I am [name]' sounds unnatural. Iska standard correct usage hai 'Hello, this is [name] speaking.' For example, 'Hello, this is Raj speaking.' Aur agar kisi ko hold pe rakhna hai, toh simply bolna 'Could you hold on a second?' Call end karne ke liye, say 'Thanks for calling, talk soon!'

Toh next time phone pe, 'I am [name]' nahi, always use 'This is [name] speaking.' Samajh aaya ab?

Ye tip pata thi ya nahi? Comment mein batao! Aur aise hi English tips ke liye The English Vault ko follow karo!

slides.headlineRest: Is Actually the Standard Phone Greeting
slides.body: When answering a phone call, it's common to introduce yourself by saying 'This is [name] speaking.' This is a polite and professional way to let the caller know who they're talking to. For example, 'Hello, this is John speaking.' A common mistake is to say 'I am [name],' which can sound unnatural in English. Instead, use the phrase 'This is [name]' to sound more natural and fluent.
slides.hindiSummary: फ़ोन पर अपना परिचय देने के लिए 'यह [नाम] बोल रहा हूँ' जैसे वाक्य का उपयोग किया जाता है
